note: seq=19: CT/SSL real-time fresh-business lane (Channel 1). RFC-6962 CT-log (LANE B, verified live) + crt.sh (LANE A) -> atlas.business. Recurring 5-min timer = continuous inflow. Lights up the investor dashboard Channel 1 (real-time).

steps.note: seq=19: CT/SSL real-time lane (Channel 1). Fetch+sha-verify ct_new_ssl_import.py; pip psycopg2-binary+cryptography; install atlas-ct-newssl.service + .timer (every 5min = continuous); run once now. LANE B (RFC-6962 CT log) verified live -> real fresh-business domains flow into atlas.business + source_record(ct_new_ssl). Non-overridable .gov/.mil drop; bounded CT_CAP=2000/run; persistent cursor.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS CT new-SSL fresh-business collector (crt.sh LANE A + RFC-6962 CT-log LANE B -> atlas.business)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=CT_CAP=2000
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/ct_new_ssl_import.py
TimeoutStartSec=20min

[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS CT new-SSL collector every 5 min (continuous real-time Channel-1 inflow)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=2min
OnUnitActiveSec=5min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-ct-newssl.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/ct_new_ssl_import.py':'7ba0afc316af33d60e316f4975e356ebcecae9d907f6b84ecd04f32a3c5d7a4b'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
